---
title: "Research"
---

## Working Papers

::: {.paper}
[Healthcare Decentralization: Evidence from a Universal Treatment Subsidy for Tuberculosis]{.paper-title}
[with Coauthor Name]{.paper-meta}
[[\[PDF\]](#) · [\[SSRN\]](#)]{.paper-meta}
:::

## Work in Progress

::: {.paper}
[Intergenerational Persistence in Child Mortality in Indonesia]{.paper-title}
[with Coauthor Name]{.paper-meta}
:::

::: {.paper}
[Health Insurance Expansion and Intergenerational Mobility]{.paper-title}
[with Coauthor Name]{.paper-meta}
:::
